title: Plantago subantarctica
taxonomy: Plantago subantarctica is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It belongs to the genus Plantago and is further classified as a member of the order Lamiales. This classification places it within the angiosperm group of plants, which are characterized by the production of flowers and seeds. The family Plantaginaceae is a group of plants commonly known as the plantains or buckthorns. Plantago subantarctica's classification is consistent with its physical characteristics and growth habits.
